subject: Create text_unit_builder.py module
description:
Create apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/ingest/text_unit_builder.py with:
- build_text_unit(source_id, unit_type, canonical_id, text, locator_json) -> dict
- create_quran_ayah(source_id, surah, ayah, text) -> dict
- create_hadith_item(source_id, collection, numbering_system, hadith_number, text) -> dict
- Uses NFC normalization from normalize/normalizer.py
- Computes SHA-256 hashes
- Returns complete text_unit record ready for DB insertion
